title: Taunt RPG
description: The TauntRPG mod introduces a craftable Taunt Horn to Minecraft, enabling players to strategically draw the aggression of nearby hostile.
body:
Werbung / Advertising

[![G-Portal](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1289491/description_c20354d2-3447-46e1-a17d-6f502cee8d3f.jpg)](https://www.g-portal.com/?ref=sparkitv) [![PayPal](https://img.shields.io/badge/PayPal-sparkitv-blue?logo=paypal&style=for-the-badge)](https://www.paypal.me/sparkitv)[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/eH38TdA) *** ## TauntRPG: The Taunt Horn – Control the Battlefield with a Blast! _TauntRPG_ introduces a powerful new artifact into Minecraft: the **Taunt Horn**. With a single blast, you become the center of attention—drawing hostile mobs directly to you. Whether you're protecting your allies or charging into the fray, this tool gives tanks and frontline fighters a strategic edge. *** ### 🔑 Key Features #### 🦴 The Taunt Horn A handcrafted item designed to turn you into the focal point of combat. #### 🎯 Targeted Aggro Control Force hostile mobs within a specific radius and direction to attack you instantly — ideal for protecting teammates or initiating large-scale battles. #### ⚙️ Directional & Customizable Effects Adjust core values to suit your playstyle. New in `v1.1.0`: directional aggro settings and a visible taunt effect! **Taunt Configuration (Default):** * **Aggro Range by Direction:** * **Front:** 100 blocks * **Back:** 50 blocks * **Left / Right:** 70 blocks * **Up:** 20 blocks * **Down:** 10 blocks * **Aggro Duration:** 60 seconds * **Cooldown:** 180 seconds All values are editable via `config/tauntrpg.json`. #### 🛠️ Multi-Stage Crafting The horn is crafted from three distinct parts: * **Horn Base** – Bone and leather form a durable core * **Horn Spikes** – Golden spikes give it a fearsome look * **Horn Grip** – Reinforced leather ensures control in combat #### 🧩 Fully Configurable Every aspect of the horn can be tailored to your needs — including direction-based taunting and precise timing. *** **🛡️ Lead the charge. Draw the fire. Command the fight.** *** **🔗 Check out my other mods:** [SparkiTV](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sparkitv/projects) **🔊 Sound Credit:** _War of the Worlds Horn 1.wav_ by [JarredGibb](https://freesound.org/people/JarredGibb/) – [Source](https://freesound.org/s/244796/) License: [Creative Commons 0](https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/)
